title: PubMed Literature
description: Biomedical literature search — case reports, signal papers, and PV research

tools.name: search-articles
tools.description: Search PubMed for articles by keyword, MeSH term, or author

parameters.name: article_type
parameters.description: Article type filter (case report, meta-analysis, review)

tools.name: get-abstract
tools.description: Get article abstract, metadata, and MeSH headings by PMID

tools.name: get-citations
tools.description: Get articles that cite a given PMID (via elink citedin; limited to PMC-indexed articles)

parameters.name: pmid
parameters.description: PubMed ID to find citations for

tools.name: search-case-reports
tools.description: Search specifically for adverse event case reports for a drug

tools.name: search-signal-literature
tools.description: Find pharmacovigilance signal detection papers for a drug (PRR, ROR, disproportionality, spontaneous reports)
